item.title: Perianal Crohn Disease in a Patient With Congenital Afibrinogenemia: A Multidisciplinary Therapeutic Management Challenge.
item.description: Cureus - Case report - Congenital afibrinogenemia is a rare autosomal recessive coagulation disorder characterized by absent or severely reduced circulating fibrinogen levels, leading to variable hemorrhagic manifestatio...

item.title: Per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS) in early life is associated with childhood intestinal inflammation: analyses of three birth cohorts.
item.description: Clinical gastroenterology and hepatology : the official clinical practice journal of the American Gastroenterological Association - Early life exposures shape intestinal and immune development and later risk of inflammatory bowel disease (IBD). Per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances (PFAS), or forever chemicals, are associated wit...
